allFeatures.name: Spellcasting
allFeatures.description: As a conduit for divine power, you can cast cleric spells.

allFeatures.name: Divine Domain
allFeatures.description: Choose one domain related to your deity: Life, Light, Nature, Tempest, Trickery, War, or Knowledge.

allFeatures.name: Channel Divinity
allFeatures.description: You gain the ability to channel divine energy directly from your deity, using that energy to fuel magical effects.

subclasses.name: Life Domain
subclasses.description: The Life domain focuses on the vibrant positive energy that sustains all life, granting unparalleled healing ability.

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description: You gain proficiency with heavy armor.

features.name: Disciple of Life
features.description: Your healing spells are more effective. Whenever you use a spell of 1st level or higher to restore hit points to a creature, the creature regains additional hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.

features.name: Channel Divinity: Preserve Life
features.description: You can use your Channel Divinity to heal the badly injured. As an action, you present your holy symbol and evoke healing energy that can restore a number of hit points equal to five times your cleric level. Choose any creatures within 30 feet of you, and divide those hit points among them. This feature can restore a creature to no more than half of its hit point maximum.

features.name: Blessed Healer
features.description: The healing spells you cast on others heal you as well. When you cast a spell of 1st level or higher that restores hit points to a creature other than you, you regain hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.

features.name: Divine Strike
features.description: You gain the ability to infuse your weapon strikes with divine energy. Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with a weapon attack, you can cause the attack to deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage to the target. When you reach 14th level, the extra damage increases to 2d8.

features.name: Supreme Healing
features.description: When you would normally roll one or more dice to restore hit points with a spell, you instead use the highest number possible for each die.

subclasses.name: Light Domain
subclasses.description: Gods of light promote the ideals of rebirth and renewal, truth, vigilance, and beauty, often using the symbol of the sun.

features.name: Bonus Cantrip
features.description: You gain the Light cantrip if you don't already know it. This cantrip doesn't count against the number of cleric cantrips you know.

features.name: Warding Flare
features.description: When you are attacked by a creature within 30 feet of you that you can see, you can use your reaction to impose disadvantage on the attack roll, causing light to flare before the attacker before it hits or misses. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once).

features.name: Channel Divinity: Radiance of the Dawn
features.description: You can use your Channel Divinity to harness sunlight, banishing darkness and dealing radiant damage to your foes. As an action, you present your holy symbol, and any magical darkness within 30 feet of you is dispelled. Additionally, each hostile creature within 30 feet must make a Constitution saving throw. A creature takes 2d10 + your cleric level radiant damage on a failed saving throw, and half as much on a successful one.

features.name: Improved Flare
features.description: You can also use your Warding Flare feature when a creature that you can see within 30 feet of you attacks a creature other than you.

features.name: Potent Spellcasting
features.description: You add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with any cleric cantrip.

features.name: Corona of Light
features.description: You can use your action to activate an aura of sunlight that lasts for 1 minute or until you dismiss it. You emit bright light in a 60-foot radius and dim light 30 feet beyond that. Your enemies in the bright light have disadvantage on saving throws against any spell that deals fire or radiant damage.

subclasses.name: War Domain
subclasses.description: War has many manifestations. Gods of war watch over warriors and reward them for their great deeds, fueling the never-ending struggle.

features.name: Bonus Proficiency
features.description: You gain proficiency with martial weapons and heavy armor.

features.name: War Priest
features.description: When you use the Attack action, you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once). You regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest.

features.name: Channel Divinity: Guided Strike
features.description: You can use your Channel Divinity to strike with supernatural accuracy. When you make an attack roll, you can use your Channel Divinity to gain a +10 bonus to the roll. You make this choice after you see the roll, but before the DM says whether the attack hits or misses.

features.name: Channel Divinity: War God's Blessing
features.description: When a creature within 30 feet of you makes an attack roll, you can use your reaction to grant that creature a +10 bonus to the roll, using your Channel Divinity. You make this choice after you see the roll, but before the DM says whether the attack hits or misses.

features.name: Divine Strike
features.description: You gain the ability to infuse your weapon strikes with divine energy. Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with a weapon attack, you can cause the attack to deal an extra 1d8 damage of the same type dealt by the weapon to the target. When you reach 14th level, the extra damage increases to 2d8.

features.name: Avatar of Battle
features.description: You gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical weapons.
